title: Connections
subtitle: All active connections across your data sources.
gamDescription: Pull ad performance data from Google Ad Manager.
noConnections: No connections yet. Click Connect to get started.
selectNetworkSubtitle: Choose the Google Ad Manager network to connect.
networksLoadError: Failed to load networks. The session may have expired.
noNetworks: No networks found in this Google account.
datasourcesSubtitle: Browse available data integrations and connect your ad platforms.
gamNetworksSubtitle: All networks available in your connected Google Ad Manager account.
gamNetworksLoadError: Failed to load networks. Make sure you have an active GAM connection.
facebookDescription: Import campaign and audience data from Facebook Ads.
instagramDescription: Pull Instagram ad performance metrics automatically.
linkedinDescription: Sync LinkedIn Ads campaign data and analytics.
tiktokDescription: Connect TikTok Ads to track performance data.
gamDashboardSubtitle: Google Ad Manager performance data for your connected networks.
noConnectionBody: Connect Google Ad Manager from the Datasources page to start pulling data.
noDataBody: Try a wider date range or wait for the first sync to complete.
errorConsentDenied: You denied access to Google Ad Manager. Please try again and grant the required permissions.
errorSessionNotFound: The connection session could not be found. Please restart the connection flow.
errorSessionExpired: The connection session expired. Please restart the connection flow.
errorTokenExchangeFailed: Failed to exchange authorization code for tokens. Please try again.
errorUnexpected: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
oauthInitiateFailed: Couldn't start the Google Ad Manager connection. Please try again.
disconnectConfirmBody: This network will stop syncing and tokens will be revoked. You can reconnect at any time.
disconnectFailed: Couldn't disconnect the network. Please try again.
syncFailed: Couldn't start a sync for this network. Please try again.
finalizeConnectionError: Could not save the selected network. Please try again.
sectionEmpty: No platforms in this section yet
catalogLoadError: Couldn't load the platform catalog. Try again.
